title: Credential config + Confluence/SharePoint providers
definition_of_done: ConfluenceProvider and SharePointProvider implemented with httptest; TestConfluenceProviderFetch and TestSharePointProviderFetch pass
outcome: ConfluenceProvider and SharePointProvider with Bearer/Basic auth; Credentials config; 4 TestProvider* tests pass

notes.msg: Implemented Credentials struct in config.go, ConfluenceProvider in confluence.go (Bearer + Basic auth), SharePointProvider in sharepoint.go (Bearer auth). Added providers_test.go with TestConfluenceProviderFetch, TestConfluenceProviderFetchBasicAuth, TestSharePointProviderFetch, TestSharePointProviderFetchErrorStatus using net/http/httptest. All tests pass (go test ./internal/sources/...) and go build ./... succeeds.
